steps.title: Use the praising clue
steps.content: The article is described as celebrating films, and the critics are said to praise the films with positive descriptions. The blank therefore needs a verb meaning that the critics expressed approval of the works.

steps.title: Reject negative or illogical verbs
steps.content:
• Choice A would mean the critics caused the films to be created, which is not the relationship here.
  • Choice B means mocked, contradicting the celebratory and praising context.
  • Choice C means ignored, but the sentence says the critics discussed and praised the films.
The answer is D.
